message:
🐛 Fix compliance cache: include errored clusters, increase timeouts (#2803)

Three fixes across all 4 compliance hooks (Kubescape, Trivy, Kyverno, Trestle):

1. Cache errored clusters — previously filtered out entries with errors,
   causing timed-out clusters (like vllm-d with 6MB response) to silently
   disappear from cache. Now includes them so they show error state on
   reload instead of vanishing.

2. Increase CRD check timeout 3s → 8s — api-resources calls take 1-7s
   through the agent WebSocket under startup load with 11 clusters
   competing for 4 concurrent slots.

3. Increase data fetch timeout 15s → 30s — large clusters (vllm-d: 4155
   items, 6MB JSON) need more time when queued behind other kubectl
   requests at startup.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
